item.title: Threats force Prince Harry to leave Meghan and his children behind as he heads to the UK
item.description: Meghan Markle and their children will stay in the US as a battle over security and credible threats on their lives delays a family reunion between King Charles and his grandchildren.

item.title: She won gold for her country. Now a cut to her NDIS plan has stripped her of independence
item.description: Mum-of-two Tracey Barrell OAM has been stripped of support to be able to shower or eat lunch under her new government plan.

item.title: Investigation launched into carers of man accused of throwing toddler into croc enclosure at Cambridgeshire’s Johnsons of Old Hurst zoo
item.description: A disabled man is accused of throwing the three-year-old boy into the crocodile enclosure.

item.title: Space mystery deepens with two more metal orbs found on Forrest Beach in north Queensland
item.description: A 50-metre exclusion zone remains active around the area.

item.title: Why Farmer Wants A Wife’s Alex left the show early with Eddy
item.description: Everything changed after Rachel discovered Eddy’s letter — a moment the farmer believes became the turning point.

item.title: University of Glasgow study finds sitting more than half an hour raises cancer death risk
item.description: There are some easy ways to combat the risk.

item.title: Aussie champions robbed of T20 World Cup moment after ‘insane’ delay for musical performance
item.description: Lord’s was emptied before the trophy presentation following one of cricket’s most baffling decisions yet.

item.title: Best lunchtime snack: Oporto drops limited-edition Porto roll and mozzarella sticks
item.description: Tastes like a slice of Europe.

item.title: Anthony Albanese apologises for Kylie Minogue ‘shag, marry, date’ comments
item.description: The PM has been accused of making a ‘mockery of Labor’s claim to be champions of women’.

item.title: Melissa George: Perth-born actress secretly welcomes fourth child aged 49 as she enjoys life in France
item.description: The TV and film actress has very quietly expanded her young family as she lives abroad.

item.title: Taylor Swift's wedding joy shattered by former guard's death
item.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's extravagant wedding celebrations at Madison Square Garden have been marred by some heartbreaking news for the superstar.

item.title: MasterChef favourite Sumeet Saigal puts an Indian twist on the classic Sunday roast
item.description: Give your Sunday roast an Indian-inspired twist.

item.title: Jessica Holmes celebrates the release of Something Sweet with her most popular apple cinnamon cake recipe
item.description: The self-taught baker shares her foolproof recipe for a simple apple cake topped with crunchy cinnamon sugar and sweet glaze.

item.title: Warm up with Chef Mel’s slow-cooked beef ragu and creamy lemon pepper polenta
item.description: The Happy Chef reveals the secrets to creating tender, flavour-packed beef ragu at home.

item.title: OTTO Sydney head chef Richard Ptacnik shares the secrets to perfect handmade raviolo
item.description: Handmade pasta, rich fillings and classic Italian flavours come together in this comforting winter dish.

item.title: Australia and Fiji strike historic new defence and climate alliance
item.description: ‘This level of ambition is possible because Australia and Fiji are Vuvale – family.’

item.title: WA Labor minister Paul Papalia quits politics to support family member with serious illness
item.description: The veteran MP’s resignation will trigger a cabinet shake-up and by-election.

item.title: Deadly clashes break out at prison in Negombo, Sri Lanka
item.description: The clashes began on Sunday in the Sri Lankan coastal town of Negombo.

item.title: Ally leaves Farmer Wants A Wife: Is this the end for her and farmer Dylan?
item.description: Sheep farmer Dylan made one final plea when the cameras weren’t rolling.

item.title: John Longmire among 10 to be contacted as Essendon begin process for next coach
item.description: The Bombers are casting a wide net despite all the talk being around two former players.

item.title: Countdown is on for 2026 Rugby League World Cup
item.description: The blockbuster tournament will be live and free on Seven and 7plus.

item.title: Shattered Alex de Minaur ‘not good enough mentally’ after latest Wimbledon failure
item.description: ‘It breaks me inside. That’s the reality of it.’

item.title: Death toll from Venezuela quakes continues to rise as thousands remain displaced
item.description: Almost 18,000 people are still homeless more than a week after twin earthquakes struck the country’s capital and nearby coastal regions.

item.title: Hamas relinquishes control over Gaza Strip in major step towards peace with Israel
item.description: The terror group has ruled the enclave for almost two decades.

item.title: Chocolate queen Kirsten Tibballs shares the ultimate six-layer cake for World Chocolate Day
item.description: Take your World Chocolate Day celebrations to the next level with Kirsten Tibballs’ showstopping six-layer chocolate cake.

item.title: Wallabies playmaker Carter Gordon ruled out of next two Tests
item.description: ‘Devastated for him.’

item.title: Origin of space debris washing ashore on Queensland beach potentially revealed
item.description: ‘The Agency is continuing to engage with international authorities to formally confirm the launch vehicle and launching state.’

item.title: French authorities accused of Princess Diana cover-up as secret file on royal’s death to remain under lock
item.description: French authorities have been accused of ‘covering up’ what really happened to Princess Diana after shocking new details emerged about a secret file connected to her death.

item.title: Belgium appear to troll Donald Trump in spicy aftermath to World Cup clash: ‘Overturn this’
item.description: The players appeared to mock the president on the field before the team issued a cheeky two-word statement.

item.title: Respected cricket umpire Trevor Krink mourned in WA and NT following sudden death
item.description: ‘What do you say about the person who was your everything?

item.title: Microsoft lay-offs set to impact Australian offices amid shift to AI
item.description: The tech giant employs more than 3000 people in Australia.

item.title: Federal government report reveals which jobs are most at risk of artificial intelligence disruption
item.description: A new report has shown who is safe and who isn’t as the generative tools continue to advance.

item.title: China's nuclear missile test sparks alarm as Prime Minister Anthony Albanese visits Pacific
item.description: The launch has sent alarm bells ringing across the Pacific where Australia’s Prime Minister is on a charm offensive.

item.title: Queensland grandfather battling cancer left out of pocket after tiny homes company collapse
item.description: The 85-year-old has lost his life savings after paying for a home he'll never receive.

item.title: Monaco bombing suspect Anastasiia Berezovska found shot dead near Kyiv, Ukraine
item.description: The global hunt for a woman wanted over a bomb attack that targeted a Ukrainian-born tycoon has ended.

item.title: Australia's poultry industry on high alert as H5 bird flu threat looms
item.description: Aussie farmers have been told to keep free range chickens inside as fears grow over a deadly outbreak.

item.title: French court opens door for Marine Le Pen to run in 2027
item.description: A Paris court has upheld Marine Le Pen's conviction but shortened her ban on running for office.

item.title: Prince Harry loses privacy case against UK tabloid publisher
item.description: The Duke of Sussex was one of several high-profile figures who accused the publisher of unlawful practices.

item.title: Reform UK leader Nigel Farage quits parliament and will run again for his seat amid financial donation scrutiny
item.description: The seasoned politician has come under scrutiny for an undeclared multi-million-dollar donation.

item.title: Shocking footage captures moment of explosion in Damascus as France's Macron visits Syria
item.description: Explosions have rocked the capital as French President Emmanuel Macron met his Syrian counterpart in a landmark visit.

item.title: Evacuation orders in place as New York high-rise on verge of collapse
item.description: Mayor Zohran Mamdani said the situation is being assessed ‘minute-by-minute’.

item.title: Lionel Messi inspires stunning World Cup comeback over Egypt despite missed penalty
item.description: The Argentinian legend has outdone himself again, even after a rare moment of fault.

item.title: Belgium players mock Donald Trump by imitating US president’s viral dance from 2024 election
item.description: ‘A lot has happened off the pitch over the last two days.’

item.title: Hundreds of snakes on the loose as wild weather in China kills 17
item.description: Authorities are using nets and stun guns to catch the snakes.

item.title: Novak Djokovic blows up at Wimbledon officials during five-hour epic: ‘You have no idea’
item.description: ‘You’re so proud of your rules and you’re not sticking to any kind of rules.’

item.title: Mexican national shot dead by ICE officers during operation in Houston
item.description: ‘This is not an isolated event across the nation.’

item.title: Egypt star Mostafa Zico accuses FIFA of ‘fixing’ World Cup as Lionel Messi conspiracy theory explodes
item.description: The governing body’s latest move has sparked another storm and fans claim they are ‘not even hiding it anymore’.

item.title: Telstra outage: Police dispute South Australian senator’s report about death linked to Telstra triple-0 outage
item.description: The senator had claimed an elderly person died after being unable to reach emergency services.

item.title: Father of GRL singer Lauren Bennett issues heartbreaking statement following shock death
item.description: She performed in two girl groups before featuring on one of the biggest hits of the 2010s

item.title: Former Australian Test cricketer Stuart MacGill fails to quash coke supply conviction
item.description: The judge has made his decision after the former Australian cricketer objected to details of his drug supply conviction.

item.title: Faye Condon: Girl wrongly given six rounds gruelling chemotherapy after UK health system misdiagnosed her
item.description: ‘Those doctors ruined my little girl’s whole childhood.’

item.title: Pauline Hanson, Holly Valance reunite in England as One Nation leader hints at major UK talks
item.description: A reunion with Holly Valance, lunch at Jeremy Clarkson’s pub and a promise of ‘big meetings’ has fuelled intrigue around Pauline Hanson’s UK trip.

item.title: Bird flu spread feared after latest SA detection, with KI sea lions in the firing line
item.description: A petrel has been confirmed as Australia’s 8th case as two more are investigated.

item.title: The Crash, Netflix: Mackenzie Shirilla appeals Ohio murder conviction in latest bid for release
item.description: Mackenzie Shirilla has shared a new selfie and a message from prison after her shocking case went viral on Netflix’s The Crash.

item.title: Unfiltered: Matt Denny opens up on ‘brutal pill’ after feather’s death
item.description: ‘To walk away from that comp and like having dedicated it to him, that was pretty brutal.’

item.title: Former Afghanistan fast bowler Shapoor Zadran loses health battle a day before 39th birthday
item.description: The much-loved star has been fondly remembered for his ‘courage’ and dedication to the game.

item.title: Matt Nean: Group 4 rugby league player has 20-year ban overturned after decade-long battle
item.description: The emotional comeback has one very special motivation.

item.title: Telstra outage turns spotlight on Australia’s frail critical infrastructure
item.description: ‘A deliberate, sustained attack on a provider like Telstra would not need to compromise every system to cause severe economic damage.’

item.title: US President Donald Trump says Memorandum of Understanding with Iran ‘is over’
item.description: ‘It’s a waste of time dealing with them.’

item.title: Sydney traffic controller Mostapha Alameddine accused of attempting to groom teen for sex

item.title: Wegovy weight loss pill could be approved in Australia by Christmas
item.description: Australia’s regulatory body is set to make a decision on the needle-free option.

item.title: State of Origin anthem singer Emma Tomlinson shocked by support after battling through audio issues
item.description: Everyone got around the performer who seemingly ‘didn’t stand a chance’ when technical problems struck early.

item.description: After weeks of flip-flopping, an Australian reality TV contestant revealed they went under the knife in Bali for a controversial procedure.

item.description: The latest in Spotlight

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: 7NEWS live updates: Telstra outage still affecting some devices, triple-0 calls, and train services in VIC
item.description: Follow along as we bring you all of the big crime, traffic and weather updates.

item.title: Queensland great Cameron Smith questions bunker’s future as NRL confirms error
item.description: ‘What is this sport doing? How can they not see that?’

item.title: Johnsons of Old Hurst: Child allegedly thrown into croc pen has six surgeries, remains in hospital
item.description: His family released a statement saying the three-year-old had now undergone six surgeries since the horrifying incident.

item.title: US launches new strikes on Iran as Trump declares ceasefire ‘over’
item.description: Iranian cities are burning in retaliation for ‘unjustified aggression’ in the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Lleyton’s son Cruz Hewitt races into quarter-finals of boys’ singles at Wimbledon
item.description: The 17-year-old is making a big statement and his dad is proudly watching on.

item.title: NRL superstar Nathan Cleary has last laugh as NSW Blues take out State of Origin series
item.description: If critics of the NRL superstar do not know what makes him tick ... they certainly do now.

item.title: Mystery winner of $40 million Powerball jackpot makes shock decision after finally claiming prize
item.description: The lucky man had no idea he held the winning ticket in his wallet for weeks.

item.title: Shark Tank’s Kevin O’Leary issues blunt data centre warning
item.description: The investor says Australia has a golden opportunity to lure billions.

item.title: Egypt officially request a FIFA investigation after World Cup exit
item.description: A stinging statement has been issued and serious accusations have been made.

item.title: AFL trade talk: St Kilda step up interest in Brisbane premiership hero Sam Marshall, big watch on Jake Stringer
item.description: Four recruiters were watching the out-of-favour midfielder dominate in the VFL.

item.title: Sad update as wreckage found in search for lost Pakistani cargo plane
item.description: Five people onboard, including two pilots, remain unaccounted for.

item.title: Wimbledon ‘Fery-tale’ rolls on as local wildcard reaches semis
item.description: The unsung Brit is another step closer to matching Goran Ivanisevic’s incredible run 25 years ago.

item.title: Toledo, Argentina: Pilot Leandro Andrés Bertazzo jumps out of plane mid-flight, leaves student to land
item.description: A routine flight lesson quickly turned into a nightmare for one student when the pilot did the unthinkable.

item.title: Hawthorn star Conor Nash could miss rest of season with ‘unusual’ neck injury
item.description: The ‘very frustrated’ midfielder remains on the sidelines with no timeline to return.

item.title: Injury carnage as Wallabies confirm halves overhaul
item.description: Flyhalf Declan Meredith will make his Test debut and fullback Jock Campbell has been benched to act as his unlikely back-up against France in Brisbane.

item.title: Albanese welcomes Indian PM Narendra Modi in Melbourne
item.description: Organisers in the Victorian capital are preparing for huge crowds of around 25,000 ahead of a free gathering with the Indian leader.

item.title: Geelong mastermind Chris Scott talks up Nathan Buckley’s coaching credentials
item.description: ‘There’s a lot that was said in that 35 seconds.’

item.title: How sole survivor of Thredbo landslide Stuart Diver inspired Blues’ Origin triumph
item.description: The ski instructor became a household name when he survived a landslide that killed 18, including his wife.

item.title: How does a Telstra outage bring down trains? A telco expert explains
item.description: While trains could technically still run, a lack of mobile connectivity wouldn’t allow for a safe and secure journey.

item.title: US President Donald Trump says he is Iran’s top assassination target as fresh strikes launched
item.description: The US president warned he could be the ‘next’ leader killed during the conflict.

item.title: Dr Chris Webster: The man who helped solve heinous Erin Patterson case admits he is now broke and jobless
item.description: He helped solve one of Australia’s biggest crimes. Now, Dr Chris Webster says he has paid the ultimate price.

item.title: Suzuki Queensland reveals Jimny Maroon special despite State of Origin loss
item.description: As a consolation prize for the Maroons' State of Origin loss, Suzuki could produce a special Maroon Edition Jimny... if enough people cast votes.

item.title: Singer Emma Tomlinson shares emotional message after ‘challenging’ State of Origin anthem
item.description: The inspirational performer overcame a range of technical difficulties to sing the anthem.

item.title: Lexus UX production set to end, replacement plans unclear – report
item.description: The Japanese luxury brand's hybrid-powered rival for the BMW X1 and Audi Q3 small SUVs is reportedly ending production in February 2027.

item.title: ‘Unacceptable’: Telstra admits more than 600 triple-0 calls failed during nationwide outage
item.description: Hundreds of welfare checks were required following the system meltdown.

item.title: Gout Gout forced to pull out of world championships with hamstring injury
item.description: ‘I’m very disappointed but I have no other possibility but to accept the situation.’

item.title: Senator Sarah Henderson defends triple-0 call during Telstra outage
item.description: One minister has slammed the calls as ‘utterly irresponsible’.

item.title: Telstra outage prompts calls for mandatory EV charger standards
item.description: EV owners being left 'high and dry' during the Telstra outage earlier this week has strengthened calls for fallback systems and alternative payment options as part of mandatory national standards.

item.title: GWM not worried about falling behind 'amazing' BYD
item.description: GWM has commended BYD's stratospheric sales growth in Australia, but remains confident in its own potential.

item.title: Are Vodafone’s mobile plans still a good deal after they got more expensive?
item.description: Vodafone’s postpaid mobile plans have jumped by $5 per month but it has added something to soften the blow.

item.title: Jarome Luai reacts after Wests Tigers move to cut ties one year before PNG Chiefs deal begins
item.description: The big-money halfback’s Wests Tigers stint is already almost over, as he prepares to play for three clubs in three years.

item.title: Pauline Hanson meets with UK far-right figure Tommy Robinson
item.description: ‘Hopefully the next leader of her nation.’

item.title: Man charged with 17-year-old girl's murder at Galiwinku, Northern Territory
item.description: Police say the 34-year-old was in a ‘domestic relationship’ with the child.

item.title: Luke Beveridge accuses AFL tribunal of setting worrying new precedent around staging
item.description: The premiership coach is furious with the AFL ‘thumbing their nose’ at the club doctor’s official report.

item.title: Social media star Neil the seal safely returns to sea after wreaking havoc in Tasmania
item.description: The five-year-old has spent several weeks at his usual twice-yearly haul-out spot.

item.title: Wagga Wagga homeless community devastated as council tears apart riverside camp: ‘It’s all they had’
item.description: ‘I understand we have to go…but we have nowhere to go. All we need is more time.’

item.title: Million-dollar McLaren 788HS revealed as final Super Series supercar
item.description: The 330km/h 788HS is the zenith of McLaren's current-generation Super Series range, which dates back almost a decade, and it's coming to Australia.

item.title: Telstra outage: Police investigating death of elderly South Australian after senator Kerrynne Liddle doubles down on triple‑0 claim
item.description: A senator had earlier been accused of causing unnecessary panic by South Australia’s police minister.

item.title: Bonnie Tyler: Legendary singer of Total Eclipse of the Heart dies aged 75 at Portugal hospital
item.description: The beloved singer had been unwell in recent months after undergoing emergency intestinal surgery.

item.title: Arrest warrant issued for alleged Adelaide dog kicker after second court no‑show
item.description: The man is accused of kicking a Staffy tied up in the back of a ute in a Bunnings carpark.

item.title: Disturbing details emerge of Queensland teen’s alleged school massacre plot
item.description: ‘I have this feeling to commit a big attack on kids. I want to hear them cry,’ the 13-year-old boy allegedly wrote.

item.title: Boos rain down as Fremantle star Luke Ryan punished for rubbing Chad Warner’s head
item.description: The Dockers defender copped a ‘harsh’ penalty after his own teammate forced a mid-season rule change.
